case_title: ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY VS. REGINALD L. ELMORE et al

docket_entries.description: SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE, REGINALD L. DOES 1 THRU 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-02-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-17-2013
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $290.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE, REGINALD L.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY MORSE, MICHAEL S.
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL S. MORSE, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY, IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE, REGINALD L.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE, REGINALD L.
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-02-2013 CONTINUED TO FEB-05-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE, REGINALD L.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY IN SUPPORT OF THE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-05-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ADR PACKAGE; NTC OF CMC HRG, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JUN-14-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE, REGINALD L.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENCOMPASS INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELMORE, REGINALD L. $4,289.96 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,579.96, SEE SCANNED DOC
